title: PM Cram sequencing question
description: A drag-to-order question: the steps are stored in the CORRECT order and the app presents them shuffled for the user to rearrange. id is optional (the app derives a stable one).

id.description: OPTIONAL — derived from content if omitted.

prompt.description: The scenario / instruction, e.g. 'Order the steps for handling an underperforming team member.'

steps.description: Steps in their CORRECT order. The app shuffles them for the user to rearrange.

note.description: Optional one-line rationale shown on review for this step's position.
